text.title: AR Design Patterns Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying AR Design Patterns to a concrete case.

section.title: Furniture placement app

example.code:
## Screens - place-object: anchoring=plane (horizontal), occlusion=people+depth, lighting=estimated - adjust-object: anchoring=saved-anchor, occlusion=people, lighting=estimated
## Gesture grammar - move: one-finger-drag on object - scale: pinch - rotate: two-finger-rotate
## Track loss - Prompt: 'Move the phone slowly to rescan the room' - State preservation: saved anchors retained; on relocalise, objects snap back.

section.note: Every screen names its anchoring + occlusion + lighting; gesture grammar uniform; track-loss path defined.
